form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at Geelong Mdn-Sw January 26 over 1440m, 16 len behind Veyepee carrying 59.5kg at $201. First up last campaign second last of 9 at Corowa Mdn-Sw December 30 over 1200m, 12 len behind Rain Queen with 59kg at $71. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on April 4 2025 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind On Broadway with 59kg at $7. Returned from break raced on the pace before fading 7th of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Shipstern Bluff carrying 59.5kg at $15. Fitter for that run and can be in the finish this time.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading 10th of 12 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1312m, 9 len behind Carriedo carrying 59kg at $21. Can push forward again and cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up got back early 8th of 11 at Swan Hill Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Monix carrying 59kg at $101. Fitter now and making headway. Should be in the money.
